zh.lifeSummary: 當Samuel Guild於1647年11月7日出生在美國麻薩諸塞州諾福爾可迪德哈姆時，他的父親John Guild32歲，母親Elizabeth Crooke29歲。他於1676年9月29日與Mary Woodcock在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1675年登記服兵役。他去世於1730年1月1日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Samuel Guild于1647年11月7日出生在美国马萨诸塞州諾福爾可迪德哈姆时，他的父亲John Guild32岁，母亲Elizabeth Crooke29岁。他于1676年9月29日与Mary Woodcock在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1675年登记服兵役。他去世于1730年1月1日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Guild
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Angus and Perthshire): apparently a nickname for someone who played a prominent part in a medieval guild. It may, however, be a Scottish variant of   Gould  .

nameMeanings.name: Samuel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (Hebrew Shemuel), possibly meaning ‘He (God) has hearkened’ (presumably to the prayers of a mother for a son). It may also be understood as a contracted form of Hebrew sha'ulme'el meaning ‘asked of God’. In the case of Samuel the son of Hannah, this would be more in keeping with his mother's statement ‘Because I have asked him of the Lord’ (1 Samuel 1:20). Living in the 11th century bc , Samuel was a Hebrew judge and prophet of the greatest historical importance, who established the Hebrew monarchy, anointing as king both Saul and, later, David. In the Authorized Version two books of the Old Testament are named after him, although in Roman Catholic and Orthodox versions of the Bible they are known as the first and second Book of Kings. The story of Samuel being called by God while still a child serving in the house of Eli the priest (1 Samuel 3) is of great vividness and has moved countless generations. In England and America the name was particularly popular among the 16th-century Puritans and among Nonconformists from the 17th to the 19th century. It became fashionable again in the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Samuel Guild was born on 7 November 1647, in Dedham, Norfolk, Massachusetts, United States, his father, John Guild, was 32 and his mother, Elizabeth Crooke, was 29. He married Mary Woodcock on 29 September 1676, in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1675. He died on 1 January 1730, in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Samuel Guild est né le 7 novembre 1647, à Dedham, Norfolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis, son père, John Guild, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Crooke, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Mary Woodcock le 29 septembre 1676, à Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1675. Il est décédé le 1 janvier 1730, à Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Samuel Guild am 7. November 1647 in Dedham, Norfolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Guild 32 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Crooke 29. Er hat am 29. September 1676 in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Mary Woodcock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1675 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 1. Januar 1730 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Guild è nato il il 7 novembre 1647 nel Dedham, Norfolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, John Guild, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Crooke, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Mary Woodcock il 29 settembre 1676, nel Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1675. Morì il 1 gennaio 1730, nel Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Samuel Guildが1647年11月7日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ノーフォルクデドハムで生まれた時，父John Guildは32歳，母Elizabeth Crookeは29歳であった。1676年9月29日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクデドハムでMary Woodcockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1675年に兵役登録をした。彼は1730年1月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクデドハムで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Samuel Guild(이)가 1647년 11월 7일 미국 매사추세츠 주 노르폴크 데드함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Guild(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Crooke(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1676년 9월 29일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 데드함에서 Mary Woodcock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1675년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1730년 1월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 데드함에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Guild nasceu em 7 de novembro de 1647, em Dedham, Norfolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, John Guild, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Crooke, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Woodcock em 29 de setembro de 1676, em Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1675. Ele faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1730, em Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Samuel Guild родился 7 ноября 1647 г. в местности дедхам, норфолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени John Guild было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Crooke, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Woodcock 29 сентября 1676 г. в местности дедхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. В 1675 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 1 января 1730 г. в местности дедхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Samuel Guild nació el 7 de noviembre de 1647, en Dedham, Norfolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, su papá, John Guild, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Crooke, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Mary Woodcock el 29 de septiembre de 1676, en Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1675. Murió el 1 de enero de 1730, en Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 82 años.
